Distribution Partnerships – Andhra Pradesh

Become a Pharma Distributor or Stockist in Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma is actively expanding its distribution network across the AP coastal belt from Srikakulam to Vijayawada. We are seeking experienced pharma distributors, sub-stockists, and C&F agents to join our supply chain in key districts. WHO GMP certified products, reliable HQ supply, and strong margins.

📦 Full District Distribution Rights ✅ WHO GMP Certified Products 💰 Competitive Distributor Margins 📍 All AP Districts Available
💬 Enquire via WhatsApp Contact Our Team
Partnership Models

Distribution Partnership Options with Crasenim Pharma

District Distributor

Full District Distribution Rights

Take on full distribution responsibility for one or more AP districts. Supply pharmacies, hospitals, nursing homes, and sub-stockists across your designated territory. Highest margin tier with largest territory.

  • Full district coverage rights
  • Supply pharmacies and institutional clients
  • Can appoint sub-stockists below you
  • Priority product allocation from HQ
Sub-Stockist

Area Sub-Stockist

Cover a specific town or mandal within a district as a sub-stockist. Receive stock from district distributor or directly from HQ. Lower investment threshold, good margin for targeted area coverage.

  • Town or mandal-level coverage
  • Lower minimum stock commitment
  • Supply local pharmacies and clinics
  • Build to distributor level over time
Hospital / Institution Supply

Institutional Supply Partner

Specialise in supplying hospitals, nursing homes, and medical institutions across your area. For distributors with existing relationships in the institutional healthcare sector in AP.

  • Bulk supply to hospitals and nursing homes
  • Credit billing arrangements available
  • Government tender supply support
  • Priority allocation for institutional orders
Why Crasenim Pharma

Why Distribute Crasenim Pharma Products?

  • WHO GMP certified products — strong doctor and pharmacist trust across AP
  • AKUMS DRUGS manufacturing — India's largest contract pharma manufacturer, consistent quality
  • Active MR field force — our MRs create prescription pull, driving pharmacy offtake for you
  • Smartdose™ differentiation — patented formulation technology supports premium brand positioning
  • Fast supply from Vizianagaram HQ — minimal stockout risk for AP-based distributors
  • Growing product range — antibiotic, cardiac, diabetic, gastro, nutritional, and pediatric categories
  • Transparent documentation — proper invoices, batch records, GST-compliant billing
Distribution Coverage Available

We are actively recruiting distributors and stockists across all 13 coastal belt districts:

Srikakulam • Vizianagaram • Visakhapatnam • Anakapalli • Kakinada • Rajahmundry • Amalapuram (Konaseema) • Eluru • Bhimavaram • Tadepalligudem • Gudivada • Machilipatnam • Vijayawada

Requirements for Distributors

Valid drug license (Form 20 / 20B), GST registration, storage facility with appropriate conditions, established distribution network in the target district or area.

Products

Products Available for Distribution

Antibiotic

Amoxsenim-CV 625

Amoxycillin 500mg + Clavulanic Acid 125mg. High-velocity GP and specialist prescription product with strong pharmacy counter movement.

Details →
Anti-Hypertensive

Telsenim Range

Telmisartan 40mg (Smartdose™). Chronic, repeat-prescription product — strong consistent monthly offtake from pharmacies with cardiac patient base.

Details →
Diabetic

Metsenim-G1/G2

Metformin PR + Glimepiride (Smartdose™). Highest-volume diabetic combination in India — reliable monthly pharmacy demand wherever diabetes prevalence is high.

Details →
Gastro

Pansenim-DSR

Pantoprazole 40mg + Domperidone 30mg SR. Consistently fast-moving gastro product — high pharmacy counter demand throughout the year across AP.

Details →
Nutritional

Crasenim-LC

Mecobalamin + L-Carnitine + Folic Acid. Growing counter-purchase supplement with strong co-prescription with antidiabetics and antihypertensives.

Details →
Pediatric Skin

Crasenim Bar

pH 5.5 Syndet Baby Bar. Growing baby skin care segment in AP urban markets with strong paediatrician recommendation driving consistent pharmacy orders.

Details →
FAQs

Distributor & Stockist FAQ

How do I become a pharma distributor for Crasenim Pharma in Andhra Pradesh?
WhatsApp us at +91 99890 74806 or email crasenimpharma@gmail.com with your name, location, current drug license details, and distribution area. Our team will assess territory availability and contact you with distribution terms within 2–3 working days.
What documents are required to become a Crasenim Pharma distributor?
You will need a valid drug license (Form 20/20B from the State Drug Controller), GST registration, a storage facility with appropriate pharmaceutical storage conditions, and a bank account in the name of your business.
Is distribution available in all AP districts?
Yes. We are actively expanding across all districts from Srikakulam to Vijayawada. Some districts may already have a distributor in place — contact us to check availability in your specific district or town.
What is the minimum order value for distribution?
Minimum order requirements vary based on the distribution level (district distributor vs sub-stockist) and territory size. These are discussed and agreed during the initial distribution enquiry process. Contact us for current applicable minimums.
Does Crasenim Pharma provide promotional support to its distributors?
Yes. Our MR team drives prescription generation in the field, creating demand pull for distributors. We also provide promotional materials, product information, and field coordination support to help distributors grow their business in AP.

Become a Crasenim Pharma Distributor in Andhra Pradesh

Contact us today to check territory availability and discuss distribution terms for your district.
